raw_consumer_statement: I have a Best Buy credit card which is a Citi Bank account. They have a service called XXXX XXXX. I informed the store clerk that I no longer want the service, as their terms of service changed. They assured me upon renewal I would not be charged. Several months later I received a text message from Citi Bank that had a payment due. I had not received any statement indicating that I had made a purchase. Upon calling Citi they informed me I have a charge on my account for the XXXX XXXX service for another year. I call Best Buy customer service, explaining the charges and was informed that because I did not contact them within XX/XX/year> days I would be obligated to pay 20 % of the charge which amounted to about {$45.00}, along with late charges, now owning over {$100.00}. I explained had I received a statement indicating a charge, otherwise I would have timely responded. Needless to say I'm frustated dealing with them and additionally concerned about having my credit dinged. My FICA score is well above XXXX.
